Uses of Annotation Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.annotation.CheckReturnValue

Packages that use CheckReturnValue
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.

  • Uses of CheckReturnValue in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements with annotations of type CheckReturnValue
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ArrayVerifier<boolean[],Boolean>
    DefaultRequirements.assertThat(boolean[] actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(boolean[], String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.

    DefaultRequirements.validateThat(C actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    static <E> ArrayValidator<E[],E>
    DefaultRequirements.validateThat(E[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Object array.
    static BooleanValidator
    DefaultRequirements.validateThat(Boolean actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Boolean.

    Validates the requirements of a Class.

    Validates the requirements of a Double.

    Validates the requirements of a Float.

    DefaultRequirements.validateThat(Integer actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Integer.

    Validates the requirements of a String.
